About Us

DOĞUŞ UNIVERSITY, MECHANICAL ENGINEERING DEPARTMENT, “THE HIGH TECH MECHANİCAL LABORATORY-MIT LAB” was established on 2016 with the fund obtained from Istanbul Development Agency (ISTKA) through the Project: TR10/15/YNK/056 “

SMART MATERILAS

: Multi-sectoral Research & Innovation and Application Platform”. MIT Lab is conducting Research, Development and educational activities along with university-industry relationship studies.  MİT Lab is a multi-disciplinary, multi-technological Research lab with its extensive infrastructure and workshop.
